commit.message:
Fix white screen: move useCallback above early return

React hooks must be called before any early return (error #310).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: serve static assets with correct MIME types on Alpine

- Add explicit mime.AddExtensionType calls for .css, .js, .svg, .ico,
  .png, and .woff2 so assets are served with correct Content-Type on
  systems without a full MIME database (e.g. Alpine Linux containers)
- Replace catch-all static file handler with a dedicated GET /assets/
  route to fix 404s caused by http.FileServer misresolving paths when
  called from a non-root handler

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Picture mode: swipe, clock, fit-to-screen, delete; fix home button

Picture mode overhaul:
- Photos fit screen (contain) instead of stretching (cover)
- Swipe left/right to change photos (touch support)
- Clock/date overlay in bottom-left corner
- Delete button removes photo from album (local DB or Immich)
- Previous/next buttons visible on hover
- Black background instead of gradient

Photo preloading:
- Preload current + next 3 images to prevent flashing
- Wait for initial image load before displaying
- Preload target image before transitioning

Home button fix:
- Uses slideToLoop(0) for Swiper loop mode
- Skip photo button moved to nav bar (no longer overlapping)

Immich delete support:
- New removeFromImmichAlbum() function
- Proxy supports DELETE method for album asset removal

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Initial Copilot Harness workstation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Update .github/workflows/ci.yml

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: HeyBlog
repository.description: Find blogroll!

commit.message:
docs: refresh business roadmap reality check

- update roadmap to current main head 62e005d and latest workflow evidence
- record merged reporting and audit-export milestones across frontend and backend
- note strict sign-off remains not configured despite green standard CI
- capture Playwright blocker compliance gaps and required improvements

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Lyrics: full-screen overlay, keep artwork visible, prevent screen sleep

- Lyrics now display as a full-screen overlay on top of everything
  instead of replacing the artwork square
- Artwork remains visible behind the semi-transparent dark overlay
- Tap anywhere on lyrics overlay to dismiss
- Screen stays on while lyrics are visible (keepScreenOn)
- Works in both portrait and landscape modes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add background favorites sync every 15 minutes

New FavoritesSyncWorker runs via WorkManager every 15 minutes even
when app is not active. Single lightweight API call (GET /api/favorites)
plus auto-cache of new favorites. Separate from the full SyncWorker
which syncs all data every 6 hours.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Immich photos: proxy thumbnails through API too

Immich requires x-api-key header for all requests including
thumbnails. CSS background-image can't send custom headers, so
route image URLs through /api/immich-proxy as well. Proxy now
handles both JSON and binary responses with proper Content-Type.
Images cached for 24h to reduce proxy load.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sync favorites immediately on app resume + 5-min poll

- onAppResumed() refreshes favorites from API when app returns to
  foreground, so changes from other devices appear instantly
- Background poll every 5 minutes keeps favorites current while
  app is active (lightweight — single API call)
- Auto-caches new favorites (audio + artwork) if auto-cache enabled

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add home button to nav bar

Home icon in bottom nav jumps directly to Dashboard (slide 0).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Immich CORS, streaming TTS, separate TTS API key

- Add /api/immich-proxy endpoint: proxies Immich API calls server-side
  to avoid browser CORS errors (NetworkError when fetching)
- Stream OpenAI TTS via MediaSource: audio starts in ~200ms instead
  of waiting 3-4s for full generation (Edge/Chrome)
- Add separate 'OpenAI TTS API Key' field so Azure OpenAI chat users
  can use a standard OpenAI key just for TTS voices
- TTS key falls back to main API key for non-Azure users

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add OpenAI TTS: natural voices (nova, shimmer, alloy, echo, fable, onyx)

Replace robotic browser speechSynthesis with OpenAI's TTS API.
Six natural-sounding voices available, plus standard/HD quality toggle.
Falls back to browser TTS if OpenAI fails or for Azure provider.
Settings UI lets you pick voice, quality, speed, and test it.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix Immich album loading: show errors, loading state, strip trailing slash

The Load Albums button silently failed — errors were caught and swallowed.
Now surfaces actual error messages (CORS, auth, network) to the user.
Also strips trailing slashes from Immich URL to prevent double-slash paths.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Widget fullscreen, Jellyfin page, recipes widget+redesign, idle fix

- WidgetContainer: expand button on hover, fullscreen overlay mode
- Jellyfin page: iframe to notjellyfin.pikesinternetcafe.com
- Recipes widget for Dashboard grid + registry entry
- RecipesPage: two-column layout (input left, saved right with reorder)
- Idle detection: use scalar dep instead of settings object ref

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix hooks order: move useMemo before early return to fix React #310

Hooks must run in the same order every render. The useMemo calls for
enabledPages/pageLabels were after the early 'return <LoginScreen />'
which meant they only ran when logged in, causing 'Rendered more hooks
than during the previous render' crash.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add artwork pre-caching and move caches to filesDir

- Move audio_cache, image_cache, artwork from cacheDir to filesDir
  so Android won't silently clear them when storage is low
- Auto-migrate existing audio_cache directory on first launch
- Pre-cache artwork via Coil when auto-caching favorites/tracks
- Pre-cache artwork during playback prefetch (next N tracks)
- Pre-cache artwork for single tracks added as favorites

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: print service returns success=True immediately after PDF generation

Async print jobs (tspl/cups/thermal) were returning success=False before
queuing, causing views.py to treat it as an error and not return pdf_url.
PDF preview overlay was never shown. Label printed but no 2s preview.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix white screen: break circular import, add picture mode, v2.1.0

Root cause: App.tsx and SettingsPanel.tsx had a circular import
(SettingsPanel imported ALL_PAGES from App). Moved shared constants
to src/constants/pages.ts.

Also adds:
- Picture mode button (photo icon) — shows only slideshow, tap to exit
- Version bumped to 2.1.0 in package.json and About section

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix offline shuffle: use cache.keys instead of iterating all tracks

Old approach loaded 44k+ tracks from Room DB then filtered each through
isTrackCached() - far too slow, causing cache path to time out silently.
New approach: getCachedTrackIds() extracts track IDs directly from
ExoPlayer cache.keys (O(cached) not O(library)), then queries only
those IDs from Room DB via getByIds(). Nearly instant.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: PDF preview for all print methods (tsc, tspl, cups, pdf) with 2s autoclose

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Recipes page: voice input, AI recipe generation, persistent storage

- New 5th Swiper slide with voice-to-ingredients and AI-powered recipe finder
- Speak or type ingredients, AI suggests 3 recipes with instructions
- Save recipes to IndexedDB + cloud sync, delete when done
- Collapsible recipe cards with prep/cook time and servings
- Supports both OpenAI and Azure OpenAI providers

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix isTrackCached: fallback to getCachedBytes when isCached fails

SimpleCache.isCached(url, 0, Long.MAX_VALUE) returns false when
content-length metadata is not stored, even for fully cached tracks.
Added fallback: if isCached fails, check getCachedBytes > 0 which
counts actual cached bytes on disk. Fixes greyed-out cached songs
and offline shuffle returning 0 tracks. Applied to track, episode,
and chapter cache checks.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Bidirectional cloud sync: push local settings if cloud is empty

On app startup, initCloudSync now checks both directions:
- Cloud has data → merge into local (existing behavior)
- Cloud empty + local has API keys → push local up to cloud
- Widget data (localStorage) also syncs both ways

This fixes the issue where settings entered while the API was broken
stayed trapped in one domain's IndexedDB and never reached the cloud.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Protect cloud save: merge with existing data, never overwrite with empty

saveAllToCloud now pulls existing cloud settings first and merges —
empty local fields won't clobber populated cloud values. Prevents
accidental key loss when saving from a fresh browser session.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Make settings cloud sync reliable: await sync, log errors

Previously all cloud syncs were fire-and-forget (.catch(() => {})) so
failures were completely silent. Now saveSettings() awaits the sync and
logs any errors. cloudPut() also logs the response body on failure for
easier debugging.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix offline fallback: try API first, always fall back to cache

NetworkMonitor.isOnline can report true even when the server is
unreachable (WiFi connected but no internet). Changed strategy:
always try API first, catch failures and fall back to local Room
DB cache. Extracted getTracksWithFallback() helper. Shuffle also
falls back to cached+audio-cached tracks when API returns nothing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: rename .vr to .vk-row - Bootstrap 5 class conflict

Bootstrap 5 uses .vr for vertical rule (display:inline-block; width:1px)
which overrode our keyboard row CSS (display:flex). Login page worked
because it has no Bootstrap. Products/other pages had 1px-wide rows. v=11

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix API: read collection from PUT body when not in query params

The cloudSync.ts PUT requests send collection in the JSON body, not query
params. Updated the API handler to parse the body first for PUT/POST to
extract collection, then reuse the parsed body to avoid double-parsing.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add offline fallback for All tab and shuffle

When offline, All tab loads tracks from the local Room database
instead of the API. Shuffle offline filters to only tracks whose
audio is actually cached (via AudioCacheManager). API failures
mid-request also fall back to cached data gracefully.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: keyboard JS positioning - window.innerWidth ile kesin piksel hesap

CSS left/right/transform yerine JS ile:
  panel.style.left = floor((window.innerWidth - min(640,vw)) / 2) + px
  panel.style.width = min(640, vw) + px
Hicbir CSS overflow/contain etkisinden bagimsiz. resize listener eklendi. v=10

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix shuffle: sample from random offsets across entire library

Server sort=random was not working - tracks always came back
alphabetically. Now fetches 50-track batches from 11 random offsets
spread across the library (0-50k range), deduplicates, and shuffles
client-side. This ensures diverse coverage of 40k+ track libraries.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: keyboard panel full-width wrapper + inner max-width centering

overflow:hidden parent app-wrap was breaking left:50% translateX(-50%)
Fix: #vkbd-panel left:0 right:0 full-width, #vkbd-inner max-width:640px margin:auto
No transform on panel, animation only translateY. v=8

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix All tab pagination hanging at 200 tracks

The derivedStateOf inside remember{} captured the initial allTracks
reference and never updated when new pages loaded. Replaced with
snapshotFlow pattern (matching GenreDetailScreen) that uses
allTracks.size as a LaunchedEffect key, so the effect restarts
each time data arrives and correctly evaluates scroll position.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Compact detail headers with back button in top bar

Refactored all 9 detail screens (artist, album, playlist, smart
playlist, genre, country, language, podcast, audiobook) from large
280-300dp hero headers to compact single-row layouts with small
artwork (48-64dp) and inline info/buttons.

Moved back button from individual screen headers to the shared
TopAppBar in AppNavigation, shown as navigation icon on all detail
routes.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Add esbuild to bundle API functions (inlines @azure/cosmos)
- Workflow: pre-build API, strip heavy node_modules, keep only @azure/functions
- Skip API build in SWA deploy action (skip_api_build: true)
- Add .funcignore for additional file exclusion
- Reduces API files from ~8500 to ~100

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add paginated All tracks tab to queue panel

Adds an 'All' tab that shows the entire library with infinite scroll
pagination (100 tracks per page). Designed for large libraries (40k+).
When tapping a track, queues a window of ~200 tracks around the
selection to avoid overloading ExoPlayer with the full library.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

test: power mode, TTL flush, crypto, buffering, dedup edge cases (batch 7)

TDD Batch 7 — Power + Crypto + Buffering + Dedup Edge Cases (6 tests):
1. chargingOverrideFromPowerSaverJumpsToPerformance — plugging in
   while in POWER_SAVER immediately jumps to PERFORMANCE (no hysteresis)
2. allExpiredPendingMessagesNoneFlushedOnDiscovery — when all buffered
   messages are TTL-expired, none are flushed on peer discovery
3. cryptoEnabledNodeRejectsUnsignedBroadcast — crypto-enabled node
   silently drops broadcast with empty signature (line 811 branch)
4. emptyPayloadBufferedForUnknownPeerAndDeliveredOnDiscovery — zero-
   length message buffered when pendingMessageTtlMs > 0, delivered as
   single zero-length chunk on peer discovery
5. resumeFlushesQueuedMessagesAndRestoresNormalSend — resume() flushes
   all pause-queued messages, subsequent sends work normally
6. duplicateBroadcastFromTwoPeersDeliveredOnce — same broadcast
   messageId arriving from two different peers delivered only once

All tests verify behavior through public API only.
316 tests, 0 failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: ESP32-GW-multi-sensor
repository.description: Multi sensor gateway for BLE sensors

commit.message:
test: timeout, multi-hop, TTL flush, reassembly, crypto edge cases (batch 6)

TDD Batch 6 — Timeout + Multi-hop + TTL Flush + Reassembly + Crypto (6 tests):
1. sweepStaleTransfersEmitsAckTimeoutForUnackedRoutedMessage — unacked
   transfer swept after 2s emits FAILED_ACK_TIMEOUT via transferFailures
2. relayNodesEmitConfirmationForRelayedAcks — 4-node chain (A→B→C→D),
   relay nodes emit confirmations for relayed ACKs via orphaned ACK
   acceptance path (RED revealed this behavior, not a bug)
3. flushPendingSkipsExpiredButSendsFreshMessages — mixed-age buffer
   with pendingMessageTtlMs=2000, msg1 expired (2500ms old), msg2
   fresh (1000ms old) → only msg2 flushed on peer discovery
4. sweepStaleReassembliesClearsIncompleteTransfer — partial chunks
   (2 of 5) create incomplete reassembly, sweep after 10s clears it,
   buffer drops to 0%
5. cryptoEnabledNodeRejectsUnsignedDeliveryAck — crypto-enabled node
   silently drops ACK with empty signature (line 956 branch)
6. chunkAckForUntrackedTransferEmitsConfirmation — chunk ACK for
   unknown/completed messageId triggers legacy fallback path (line 768)

All tests verify behavior through public API only.
310 tests, 0 failures.

testability, and maintainability. All systems remain fully integrated.

Implement pkg/game/game.go with full Game struct and main game loop:

commit.message:
test: lifecycle, relay, buffering edge cases (batch 5)

TDD Batch 5 — Lifecycle + Relay + Buffering Edge Cases (6 tests):
1. pausedNodeStillReceivesInboundRoutedMessage — pause only affects
   outbound; inbound messages still delivered (GREEN by construction)
2. noMessageEmissionsAfterStop — stopped node ignores incoming data,
   scope.cancel() terminates all collection coroutines
3. relayQueueOverflowEvictsOldestFIFO — with capacity=2 and 4 queued
   relays, only msg-3 and msg-4 survive (oldest evicted)
4. ttlZeroSendToUnknownPeerFailsImmediately — pendingMessageTtlMs=0
   bypasses store-and-forward, emits FAILED_NO_ROUTE immediately
5. orphanedDeliveryAckEmitsConfirmation — ACK for unknown messageId
   still emits on deliveryConfirmations (external ACK feature)
6. lateAckAfterSweepEmitsDiagnosticNotConfirmation — late ACK after
   sweepStaleTransfers emits LATE_DELIVERY_ACK diagnostic, does NOT
   emit false confirmation (exactly-once semantics preserved)

All tests verify behavior through public API only.
304 tests, 0 failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix mic button: always visible, use any-cast for cross-browser Speech API

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: power mode gossip throttle, shed reassembly, appId diagnostic

TDD Batch 4 — Data Isolation + Reliability + Feature Completion (6 tests):
1. duplicateChunkIsIdempotent — duplicate chunk received twice doesn't
   cause double message delivery (GREEN by construction, dedup guards)
2. shedMemoryPressureClearsIncompleteReassembly — verify partial
   reassembly state is cleared by shedMemoryPressure, buffer drops to 0%
3. powerSaverModeIncreasesEffectiveGossipInterval — POWER_SAVER triples
   gossip interval (RED→GREEN: added power mode multiplier)
4. balancedModeDoublesGossipInterval — BALANCED doubles gossip interval
5. appIdMismatchEmitsDiagnostic — APP_ID_REJECTED diagnostic emitted on
   broadcast with wrong appIdHash (RED→GREEN: was silently dropped)
6. powerModeStacksWithRouteCountThrottle — power mode and route count
   multipliers compose correctly (1000 × 1.5 × 2 = 3000ms)

Production changes:
- effectiveGossipInterval() now factors in power mode:
  POWER_SAVER → 3× base, BALANCED → 2× base, PERFORMANCE → 1×
  Stacks with route count throttle (>100 → 1.5×, >200 → 2×)
- handleBroadcast() emits APP_ID_REJECTED diagnostic on appId mismatch
- Added APP_ID_REJECTED to DiagnosticCode enum

298 tests, 0 failures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore(repo): checkpoint current changes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: wire protocol hardening + send failure diagnostics

TDD batch — 6 new tests (292 total, 0 failures):

Wire protocol decode hardening (prevents hostile packet crashes):
- decodeBroadcast rejects truncated signature (sigLen exceeds buffer)
- decodeChunk rejects sequenceNumber >= totalChunks
- decodeRouteUpdate rejects NaN/Infinity/negative cost
- decodeDeliveryAck rejects truncated signature (sigLen exceeds buffer)

Diagnostic observability:
- SEND_FAILED: safeSend emits diagnostic on transport exception
  (was silently swallowed, only circuit breaker recorded)
- RATE_LIMIT_HIT: broadcast rate limit exceeded emits diagnostic
  (was returning failure without observability)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: diagnostic emissions for silent drops + pending eviction failure

TDD batch — 6 new tests (286 total, 0 failures):

Diagnostic observability (4 previously-dead codes now emitted):
- MALFORMED_DATA: handleIncomingData catch emits diagnostic with
  type byte, size, and error message (was silently dropped)
- BUFFER_PRESSURE: emitted when buffer utilization >= 80% after
  storing outbound transfer
- ROUTE_CHANGED: emitted when best route to a destination changes
  next-hop (includes old/new cost and next-hop)
- GOSSIP_TRAFFIC_REPORT: emitted after each broadcastRouteUpdate
  round with peer count and route count

Hardening:
- Pending message eviction emits TransferFailure with
  FAILED_BUFFER_FULL (was silently dropped)
- Inbound rate limit emits RATE_LIMIT_HIT diagnostic with origin
  hex (was silently dropped)

animated width via BoxWithConstraints + animateDpAsState + clipToBounds.
Queue panel stays in composition when hidden (width=0), so toggling is
instant with no recomposition cost. Also added stable keys to all
LazyColumn items for better recycling.

repository.name: enfiproV3
repository.description: Endüstriyel tartılı etiketleme POS sistemi — Docker, Django, Node.js

commit.message:
Remove BottomSheetScaffold, use queue toggle in portrait mode

Portrait now playing uses same queue-toggle approach as landscape:
- Queue button toggles inline queue panel
- When queue open: compact art+info row at top, seekbar, controls, then scrollable queue
- When queue closed: full-size artwork, track info, seekbar, full controls
- Removed BottomSheetScaffold and swipe card entirely
- Removed unused QueueSheetContent composable
- Cleaned up unused coroutine scope and import

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Theme widgets, Azure OpenAI support, fix calendar event flash

- WidgetContainer, Calendar, Countdown use --theme-card/--theme-accent CSS vars
- Add AI provider toggle (OpenAI vs Azure OpenAI) with endpoint/deployment config
- Stabilize calendarIds with useMemo to prevent re-fetch loop
- Keep existing events on calendar refresh failure (no flash-disappear)
- Update storage defaults for new AI settings

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

font: Oswald Regular as project font for PDF labels

- Add OswaldRegular.ttf to print-service/
- _register_font() prefers Oswald, fallback to DejaVu/Helvetica
- Font is baked into Docker image via COPY . .
